title: panios
intro: Panios, a lesser-known herb, is actually another name for the plant known as Silybum marianum, also referred to as the blessed thistle or milk thistle. The medicinal properties of the panios plant are primarily attributed to its seeds, which contain a flavonoid called silymarin, known for its hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of panios include protection against liver damage, improved liver function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular natural remedy for liver and gallbladder issues. Panios is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, or teas, which can be consumed to support liver health and overall well-being.
